_templateMeta.name: Dialog-Driven Quest
_templateMeta.description: An NPC interaction quest: the player clicks an object, sees a dialog, and receives a task.

_annotations.counters[0]: Tracks whether the player has spoken to the NPC (0 = not yet, 1 = talked).
_annotations.counters[1]: Tracks whether the quest task is complete (0 = incomplete, 1 = done).
_annotations.quests[0]: The main quest. Set localization tokens for name and description.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[0]: Stage 1: the player must interact with the NPC object to receive the quest briefing.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[0].triggers[0]: Fires when the player interacts with the NPC object. Replace 'npc_quest_giver' with your NPC's entity SID.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[0].triggers[0].actio: Show the quest briefing dialog. Replace 'dialog_quest_start' with your dialog ID.
Activate stage 2 after the player has spoken to the NPC.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[1]: Stage 2: the actual task (here: defeat a squad). Customize with your quest objective.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[1].triggers[0]: Fires when the task is complete. Replace 'E_Squad_QuestTarget' with your objective entity SID.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[1].triggers[0].actio: Show the quest completion dialog. Replace 'dialog_quest_done' with your dialog ID.
